						<BuoyancyMode type="int" value="0" min="0" max="1000"/>
						<UseExtraBodyBounds type="bool" value="0" comment="Set to 1 to add horse-style extra head/body bounds"/>

						<EntitySizeDeviation type="double" value="0" min="0" max="10000" step="0.1" comment="Entities will be up to this many meters away from the AverageSize (set to 0 to just force AverageSize)"/>

					<contents/>
				</Entity>
			</contents>

		<Health name="Health">
			<attributes/>
			<contents>
				<Health name="Health">
					<attributes>
						<NoReactToZeroDamageAttacks type="bool" value="0"/>
						<MaxHitPoints type="double" value="1000" min="0" max="10000"/>
            <MaxKOPoints type="double" value="100" min="0" max="10000"/>
            <KnockOutTime type="double" value="10" min="0" max="10000"/>
						<DestroyTime type="double" value="15" min="-1" max="1000" comment="How many seconds to wait before automatically destroying dead actors"/>
						<Unbreakable type="bool" value="0"/>
						<Unmovable type="bool" value="0"/>
						<SlightlyDamagedHitPoints type="double" value="0" min="0" max="1000" step="0.1" comment="When the actor is slightly damaged"/>
						<HeavilyDamagedHitPoints type="double" value="0" min="0" max="1000" step="0.1" comment="When the actor is heavily damaged"/>
						<FullyDamagedHitPoints type="double" value="0" min="0" max="1000" step="0.1" comment="When the vehicle is fully damaged, and starts losing hit points"/>
						<FullyDamagedHitPointLossRate type="double" value="1" min="0" max="1000" step="0.1" comment="How fast (HP/sec) the vehicle loses HP when fully damaged"/>
						<LowDropDistance type="double" value="5" min="0" max="1000" step="0.1" comment="How far to fall before taking low damage"/>
						<LowDropDamage type="double" value="0" min="0" max="1000" step="0.1" comment="How much damage to take after falling low drop distance"/>
						<MediumDropDistance type="double" value="10" min="0" max="1000" step="1.0" comment="How far to fall before taking medium damage"/>
						<MediumDropDamage type="double" value="1" min="0" max="1000" step="1.0" comment="How much damage to take after falling medium drop distance"/>
						<HighDropDistance type="double" value="10" min="0" max="1000" step="1.0" comment="How far to fall before taking high damage"/>
						<HighDropDamage type="double" value="1" min="0" max="1000" step="1.0" comment="How much damage to take after falling high drop distance"/>
						<DeathDropDistance type="double" value="20" min="0" max="1000" step="1.0" comment="How far to fall before automatic death"/>
						<DamageScaleHead type="double" value="1.000" min="0" max="1000" step="0.1" comment="Damage multiplier for head shots (on top of projectile damage)"/>
						<DamageScaleTorso type="double" value="1.000" min="0" max="1000" step="0.1" comment="Damage multiplier for torso shots (on top of projectile damage)"/>
						<DamageScaleArm type="double" value="1.000" min="0" max="1000" step="0.1" comment="Damage multiplier for arm shots (on top of projectile damage)"/>
						<DamageScaleLeg type="double" value="1.000" min="0" max="1000" step="0.1" comment="Damage multiplier for leg shots (on top of projectile damage)"/>
						<DamageScaleBack type="double" value="1.000" min="0" max="1000" step="0.1" comment="Damage multiplier for shots in the back (on top of projectile damage and body region multiplier)"/>
						<DamageScaleFleshWound type="double" value="1.000" min="0" max="1000" step="0.1" comment="Damage multiplier for grazing shots (on top of projectile, body region, and back shot scale)"/>
					</attributes>
				</Health>
			</contents>
		</Health>

            <m_DefaultInaccuracyPenalty type="double" value="0.6" min="0" max="1000" step="0.1"/>

						<m_IdleColor type="double3" value="1 1 1" min="0" max="1" step="0.1"/>
            <m_OutOfRangeColor type="double3" value="0.2 0.2 1" min="0" max="1" step="0.1"/>
            <m_AllyColor type="double3" value="0.25 1 0.25" min="0" max="1" step="0.1"/>
						<m_EnemyColor type="double3" value="1 0.25 0.25" min="0" max="1" step="0.1"/>
						<m_NeutralColor type="double3" value="1 1 1" min="0" max="1" step="0.1"/>
						<m_InvincibleColor type="double3" value="1 1 0.25 " min="0" max="1" step="0.1"/>
						<m_InvalidateObstructedTargetTime type="double" value="2.0" min="0" max="100000" step="0.05"/>
						<m_InvalidateObstructedCoverTargetTime type="double" value="5.0" min="0" max="100000" step="0.05"/>
            <m_AngleWeight type="double" value="85.0" min="0" max="100.0" step="0.01"/>
            <m_DistanceWeight type="double" value="15.0" min="0" max="100.0" step="0.01"/>
            <m_ExcludeHardLockTime type="double" value="0.002" min="0" max="10.0" step="0.01"/>
            <m_HardlockOnZoomAcquireRadiusDistanceFactor type="double" value="0.125" min="-100.00" max="100.0" step="0.001"/>
            <m_HardlockOnZoomAcquireRadiusMinDistanceUsingFactor type="double" value="5.0" min="0" max="100.0" step="0.01"/>

            <m_TargetReSelectMinDotProduct type="double" value="0.01" min="0.01" max="1.0" step="0.001"/>
            <m_BumpAlignmentWeight type="double" value="1.0" min="0" max="100.0" step="0.001"/>
            <m_BumpScreenFactorWeight type="double" value="66.0" min="0" max="100.0" step="0.001"/>
            <m_BumpDepthWeight type="double" value="33.0" min="0" max="100.0" step="0.001"/>
            <m_TargetingViewportFOVOverrride type="double" value="90.0" min="5.0" max="180.0" step="0.01"/>
            <m_MinVisibilityPercentage type="double" value="0.01" min="0.0" max="1.0" step="0.01"/>
            <m_CoverExtraNormalizedScreenAcquisitionRadius type="double" value="0.125" min="0.001" max="1.0" step="0.001"/>
            <m_MaxSkeletonVisibilityChecks type="int" value="5" min="1" max="100" step="0.01"/>
            <m_UseReticleColoring type="bool" value="1"/>

            <m_CanReselectLockTargetFromVehicleClassic type="bool" value="0"/>

		<Target name="Target">
			<attributes/>
			<contents>
        <Target name="Target">
          <attributes>
            <m_TargetOffset type="double3" value="0 0 0" min="-10" max="10" step="0.02"/>
            <m_ParentBone type="string" value="head" maxlength="32"/>
            <m_HardLockAnchorBone type="string" value="head" maxlength="32"/>
            <m_LassoLockAnchorBone type="string" value="" maxlength="32"/>
            <m_CutsomVisibilityTraversal type="string" value="" maxlength="32"/>
            <m_CanBeSoftLocked type="bool" value="1" />
            <m_CanBeHardLocked type="bool" value="1" />
            <m_CanBeMeleeTargeted type="bool" value="1"/>
            <m_HardLockHostileOnly type="bool" value="0"/>
            <m_SoftlockOffset type="double3" value="0 0 0" min="-10" max="10" step="0.02"/>
            <m_HardlockAnchorlockOffset type="double3" value="0 0 0" min="-10" max="10" step="0.02"/>
            <m_SoftlockHeight type="double" value="1.0" min="0" max="1000" step="0.01"/>
            <m_SoftlockWidth type="double" value="0.5" min="0" max="1000" step="0.01"/>
            <m_HardlockHeight type="double" value="2.0" min="0" max="1000" step="0.01"/>
            <m_HardlockWidth type="double" value="0.8" min="0" max="1000" step="0.01"/>
            <m_LassoHardLockBias type="double" value="0.0" min="-10000" max="10000" step="0.01"/>
            <m_ScoreBaseNeutral type="double" value="0.0" min="-10000" max="10000" step="0.01"/>
            <m_ScoreBaseHostile type="double" value="0.0" min="-10000" max="10000" step="0.01"/>
            <m_AllowHardLockWhenUnderAttack type="bool" value="1" />
            <m_ExcludeHardLock type="bool" value="0" />
            <m_UseFullScreenAcquisition type="bool" value="1" />
            <m_UseAimAssist type="bool" value="1" />
          </attributes>
          <contents/>
        </Target>
			</contents>
		</Target>

		<Inventory name="Inventory">
			<attributes/>
			<contents>
				<Inventory name="Inventory">
					<attributes>
						<m_PickupCenterOffset type="double3" value="0 0 0" min="-100" max="100" step="0.02"/>
						<m_WeaponString type="string" value="ammo_lantern" maxlength="127" comment="Weapons this character holds at beginning."/>
						<m_ItemString type="string" value="ammo_lantern" maxlength="127" comment="Items this character holds at beginning."/>
						<m_AccessoryString type="string" value="ammo_lantern" maxlength="127" comment="Accessories this character has."/>
						<m_StartingItem type="string" value="ammo_lantern" maxlength="127" comment="Items this character starts out with in hand."/>
						<m_RandomDropItem type="string" value="ammo_lantern" maxlength="127" comment="Item to be randomly dropped when the actor dies."/>
						<m_WeaponPickupSoundName type="string" value="SAG_Guns:UNHOLSTER" maxlength="64" comment="Sound for weapon pickup"/>
						<m_ItemPickupSoundName type="string" value="SAG_Hud:WEAPON_RING_ROTATE" maxlength="64" comment="Sound for item pickup"/>
						<m_DropRange type="double" value="2" min="0" max="10" step="0.1" comment="This is the max distance the items get thrown out on death"/>
						<m_PickUpRange type="double" value="10" min="0" max="10" step="0.1" comment="This is the max distance konoko can pick up items from"/>
						<m_RandomDropProbability type="double" value="50" min="100" max="100" step="5" comment="Probability for dropping item specified by m_RandomDropItem"/>
						<m_DropItemsOnDeath type="bool" value="1" comment="Spawn actors from inventory items if this is set"/>
						<m_CanBePickedUp type="bool" value="1" comment="This allows actors to add these items to their own inventory"/>
						<m_MaxInventorySlots type="int" value="100" min="0" max="100" step="1" comment="max number of inventory slots possible"/>
						<m_NumInitialInventorySlots type="int" value="10" min="0" max="100" step="1" comment="initial number of inventory slots possible"/>
					</attributes>
					<contents/>
				</Inventory>
			</contents>
		</Inventory>

			</contents>
		</CreatureAudio>

			<attributes/>
			<contents>

					<attributes>

    <Camera name="Camera">
      <attributes/>
      <contents>
        <Camera name="Camera">
          <attributes>
            <m_ArcCenterScale type="double3" value="0.0 1.6 -0.3" max="10.0" min="-10.0" step="0.01"/>
            <m_MinEulers type="double3" value="-0.020 -0.015 0.0" max="3.14" min="-3.14" step="0.01"/>
            <m_MaxEulers type="double3" value="0.020 0.015 0.0" max="3.14" min="-3.14" step="0.01"/>
            <m_MaxShakeDuration type="double" value="0.25" max="100.0" min="0.0" step="0.01"/>
            <m_ShakeDampeningStart type="double" value="0.00" max="100.0" min="0.0" step="0.01"/>
            <m_HeadShotMinEulers type="double3" value="-0.07 -0.02 0.0" max="3.14" min="-3.14" step="0.01"/>
            <m_HeadShotMaxEulers type="double3" value="0.07 0.02 0.0" max="3.14" min="-3.14" step="0.01"/>
            <m_HeadShotMaxShakeDuration type="double" value="0.75" max="100.0" min="0.0" step="0.01"/>
            <m_HeadShotShakeDampeningStart type="double" value="0.37" max="100.0" min="0.0" step="0.01"/>
            <m_MaxFovProportionDegrees type="double" value="90.0" max="100.0" min="0.0" step="0.01"/>
            <m_DamageRangeMin type="double" value="50.0" max="100.0" min="0.0" step="0.01"/>
            <m_DamageRangeMax type="double" value="100.0" max="100.0" min="0.0" step="0.01"/>
            <m_ShakeWhenHit type="bool" value="0"/>
            <m_DeathTuningName type="string" value="deathCamSPModified" maxlength="32"/>
            <m_DeathCameraAnchorVecolityScalar type="double" value="0.5f" max="10.0" min="0.0" step="0.01"/>
          </attributes>
        </Camera>
      </contents>
    </Camera>

	</contents>
</ComponentList>
